HGSS.503.0000:
Hi!\f
We’re holding an eatathon contest.
We can’t serve you right now. Sorry.
HGSS.503.0001:
Huff... Huff... Munch... Munch...
Huff... Huff... Munch... Munch...\f
When it comes to eating contests,
I’m quite confident.\f
But I can’t handle hot food.\r
If I have to hurry eating, my mouth...\r
Hot, hot, hot!\f
HGSS.503.0002:
Chomp, chew, munch...
(Please don’t talk to me now!)\f
Chomp, chew, cough...
(Food is gonna come out of my mouth...)\f
HGSS.503.0003:
Munch munch munch...
...What? This is the eatathon contest?\f
Ouch!\f
I thought it was the speed-eating
contest...\f
HGSS.503.0004:
Crunch... Crunch...\f
I can keep eating!
More, chef!\f
HGSS.503.0005:
Crunch... Crunch...\f
I can keep eating!
More, chef!\f
HGSS.503.0006:
Maylene: Munch munch munch...
The eatathon contest!\f
I never dreamed of such a
wonderful thing.\f
After a strict diet during training,
I can eat like a HIPPOWDON.\f
The winner eats for free, too.
That’s just a dream come true!\f
HGSS.503.0007:
Eatathon Contest!
No time limit!\r
A battle without end!\f
The biggest eater gets it
all for free!
